_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Designing together involves effectively planning and run design sessions that include senior leaders or stakeholders; helping teams connect and work across organisational boundaries; coaching other designers in how to involve stakeholders of any level in the design process; developing or introduce more effective ways to design together.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.371), LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.365).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.359). Shared vocabulary: [designing, level]. DDaT-only terms [across, boundaries, coaching, connect, design, designers] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, communication, complex, executing, execution, executive] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.841, R=0.861). R exceeds P by 0.021 — the WIDAI KSA's 19 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 47 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Designing together involves effectively planning and run design sessions that in" and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.456 > STS 0.359 (gap +0.096). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [designing, level] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [designing, level]. DDaT-only: [across, boundaries, coaching, connect, design, designers]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, communication, complex, executing, execution, executive].
